name: @nimblebraininc/synapse-collateral
description: Collateral Studio — Typst-powered document generation with brand-aware templates, live preview, and conversational iteration

tools.name: get_theme
tools.description: Get the current document's theme (colors, fonts, spacing)

tools.name: set_theme
tools.description: Update theme tokens in the current document

tools.name: list_templates
tools.description: List available templates with full variable schemas

tools.name: get_template
tools.description: Get a template's full details: info, source, and theme

tools.name: create_template
tools.description: Create a new template from source and schema

tools.name: duplicate_template
tools.description: Duplicate an existing template under a new ID

tools.name: delete_template
tools.description: Delete a user-created template

tools.name: create_document
tools.description: Create a new document and set it as the active workspace

tools.name: list_documents
tools.description: List saved documents with metadata

tools.name: open_document
tools.description: Load a saved document into the workspace

tools.name: save_document
tools.description: Persist the current workspace to the filesystem

tools.name: save_as_template
tools.description: Promote the current document's source into a new reusable template

tools.name: delete_document
tools.description: Delete a document from disk

tools.name: get_workspace
tools.description: Get workspace metadata: document name, template, and theme

tools.name: get_source
tools.description: Get the current document's full Typst source code

tools.name: patch_source
tools.description: Apply targeted find/replace edits to the Typst source

tools.name: set_source
tools.description: Replace the full Typst source

tools.name: import_content
tools.description: Extract text from an uploaded file for use as source material

tools.name: upload_asset
tools.description: Upload a binary asset (image, logo, icon) for use in documents

tools.name: list_assets
tools.description: List uploaded asset filenames available for use in documents

tools.name: delete_asset
tools.description: Delete an uploaded asset by filename

tools.name: get_voice
tools.description: Get the current brand voice document

tools.name: set_voice
tools.description: Set the brand voice document that guides writing style

tools.name: get_components
tools.description: Get the current reusable Typst components

tools.name: set_components
tools.description: Save reusable Typst components (functions, styles, macros)

tools.name: list_fonts
tools.description: List font families available to typst (system + custom)

tools.name: install_font
tools.description: Install a font from URL or base64 data

tools.name: preview
tools.description: Render the current document to PNG preview images

tools.name: preview_template
tools.description: Preview a template without creating a document

tools.name: export_pdf
tools.description: Export the current document as a final PDF

tools.name: compile_typst
tools.description: Compile raw Typst source to PDF
